caption: The video features a man performing live music in front of an audience. He is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with intricate designs, including a red and black emblem on his chest. The man is playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. His expression is focused as he strums the guitar and sings, suggesting he is deeply engaged in his performance. The background consists of wooden blinds, indicating an indoor setting, possibly a small concert venue or community hall. The audience members, visible in the foreground, appear to be attentively watching and listening to the performance. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, which might indicate the name of the event or organization hosting the performance.
